case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING VS CITY INVESTMENT CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $359.50 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT CITY INVESTMENT CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 04
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY INVESTMENT CORPORATION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY INVESTMENT CORPORATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
